title: Running From The Island
description: A simple modpack about surviving on the island surrounded by endless ocean!
body:
hows it still alive

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e277162103080e33ad6ec616113d6431b7f0e882.png)

# Info
**RFTI - Modpack about surviving on the Island, surrounded by endless Ocean.**

**No extra bosses or weapons, only refreshed bossfights of original Minecraft bosses (Like Wither and Enderdragon)**

**Make sure to follow the project to stay updated!**

# Features

- Revamped dimensions like you've seen in every Vanilla+ modpacks
- Enhanced Enderdragon and Wither bossfights (you've seen this before in Vanilla+ modpacks lol)
- Tons of mods, so you cant even boot up the modpack
- Totally unoptimized and unconfigured 
- Just an ***AWFUL*** modpack
